notifications.title: Get sleep window alerts
notifications.body: We'll give you a heads up 15 min before {{childName}} is ready for a nap.
notifications.enabledBody: You'll get notified when {{childName}}'s sleep window is closing.

quickLog.title: Quick log
quickLog.partnerTip: Get water, a pillow and put your phone away during nursing. Your support makes it easier for both of you.
quickLog.dadTipNewborn: {{childName}} feeds often in the first days. Have water, snacks and a pillow ready — it makes a huge difference.

tasks.title: Tasks
tasks.addFirst: Add a task to get started

onboarding.whereAreYou: Where are you on the journey?
onboarding.weAdaptContent: We adapt all content to your specific situation.
onboarding.weCalculateWeek: We automatically calculate which week you're in.
onboarding.weAdaptAge: We adapt content to the baby's age.
onboarding.weShowContent: We show content that fits your role.
onboarding.personalApp: So the app feels personal — just for you.
onboarding.personalExperience: So we can make the experience truly personal.
onboarding.canChangeLater: You can always add or change this later.
onboarding.birthDetailsSub: So we can adapt advice on recovery and feeding. Everything is optional.
onboarding.leaveAdapt: So we can adapt who does what in daily life.
onboarding.changeLaterSettings: You can always change this in settings.

pregnancy.babyGrowing: Baby is growing day by day — everything is as it should be.

barn.leapsDesc: Babies go through predictable developmental leaps. Mark them as reached if {{childName}} has already achieved them.

diary.title: Diary
diary.diaryWaitingDesc: Once baby is born you can log nursing, diapers, sleep and notes.
diary.mealsLow: {{name}} has had {{count}} meals — recommended is at least {{rec}}.
diary.wetLow: Only {{count}} wet diapers — expected is {{rec}}+. Watch for hydration.
diary.allGood: {{name}} has had enough food and diaper changes today. You're doing it!

sleep.title: Sleep
sleep.sleepWaitingDesc: Once baby is born you can track sleep, get nap recommendations and connect monitors.
sleep.recommended: Recommended: approx. {{hours}} hours per day · {{naps}}/{{maxNaps}} naps
sleep.connectMonitor: Connect baby monitor for automatic logging

together.title: Teamwork
together.mentalLoadDesc: It's not about counting — but about understanding who carries what. Visibility creates balance.
together.imbalanceHint: {{name}} has many tasks on the list. Maybe you can review and redistribute together?
together.nightShiftsDesc: Bedtime is about putting {{childName}} to bed — closeness, calm and a consistent routine. Both parents can do it — it doesn't require nursing, just presence. 🌙
together.conversationStarter: Conversation starter — to strengthen your bond 💛

chat.title: Ask Melo
chat.subtitle: YOUR TRUSTED ADVISOR
chat.askAbout: Ask about sleep, development, wellbeing and daily life
chat.disclaimer: Answers are advisory and do not replace acute medical help. If concerned — always call your doctor.
chat.connectionError: Could not connect to AI. Check your connection.

play.title: Play & activities
play.playAheadDesc: Once baby is born, you'll get age-based suggestions for play, stimulation and bonding.
play.goodRightNow: This is especially good right now

calendar.title: Calendar
calendar.levelUpMsg: You've reached a new level! Keep up the amazing journey 🌟

shop.title: Subscription
shop.subtitle: NEVER RUN OUT — DELIVERED TO YOUR DOOR
shop.smartReorderDesc: Melo knows when you're running low — and orders automatically
shop.sizeSwitch: {{name}} weighs approx. 6.5 kg. Melo suggests switching to the next size in ~10 days.

commandCenter.readyForNap: {{childName}} is ready for a nap in ~{{minutes}} min 💤
commandCenter.dimLights: Good time to dim the lights and find calm.
commandCenter.useMeTime: Use this time for yourself. Rest, eat, or just be.
commandCenter.helpPartner: Good time to help {{partnerName}} — or take a break yourself.
commandCenter.minMeals: The recommendation is at least {{min}} daily at this age. Maybe time for another meal?
commandCenter.expectDiapers: Typically expect 4-6+ wet diapers daily. Keep an eye on {{childName}}'s hydration.
commandCenter.leapTipMom: Extra closeness and patience helps {{childName}} through this.
commandCenter.leapTipDad: {{childName}} may be extra clingy. Hold on — it's a phase.
commandCenter.youMadeIt: You've made it through the day 💚
commandCenter.tellPartner: When {{partnerName}} comes home, try to say what you need most. It's not complaining — it's communicating.
commandCenter.takeOver: Try to take over as soon as you get home. Even a 30-minute break makes a huge difference.
commandCenter.useLeaveDay: Use your leave day proactively — bath time, walks or play. Your bond strengthens every minute.
commandCenter.feelMorning: Check in with what you need today. You don't need a plan.
commandCenter.morningWalk: Quiet morning with {{childName}}? A stroller walk brings calm for both of you.
commandCenter.shareRoutine: A good day to share the morning routine and find your rhythm together.
commandCenter.oneThingAtATime: You're finding your rhythm. One thing at a time.
commandCenter.eveningDesc: Bath, diaper, pajamas, calm. {{childName}} senses your mood.
commandCenter.restMom: Rest up. Tomorrow is a new day.
commandCenter.partnerSleep: Make sure {{partnerName}} gets some sleep too. You're a team.
commandCenter.closenessDesc: Skin-to-skin, eye contact and gentle sounds. That's all it takes right now.
commandCenter.tummyDesc: 3-5 minutes on the tummy strengthens neck and back. Lie down beside them!
commandCenter.sensoryDesc: Try a rattle, sing a song, or show contrast images. Everything is new and exciting!
commandCenter.exploreDesc: Cloth books, grasping toys, or just explore things in the kitchen. Everything is a discovery!
commandCenter.playDesc: Build towers, play peekaboo, or go exploring. Play is learning!
commandCenter.tasksTodayDesc: You have things on the list — take them at your own pace.

support.useTaskList: Use the task list to show who does what — it helps both of you.
support.momHasMore: It seems one of you has had a bit extra this past week. Maybe you can swap a routine today?
support.dadHasMore: It seems one of you has taken on extra. Make sure both get breaks.
support.balanced: You've distributed things well this past week. Keep talking about it.

morCards.bodyHealingOp: Your body is healing from surgery
morCards.bodyHealingOpDesc: Avoid heavy lifting. Move slowly and listen to your body.
morCards.bodyHealingOpReassure: It's completely normal that it takes time. You are brave.
morCards.scarHealing: The scar is healing — be patient
morCards.scarHealingDesc: Numbness and tingling is normal. Avoid tight pants.
morCards.scarHealingReassure: Your body knows what it's doing. Give it time.
morCards.recovery12weeksDesc: Start gently with movement. The pelvic floor needs attention too.
morCards.recovery12weeksReassure: You're doing great — even if it doesn't feel like it.
morCards.bodyWorking: Your body is working hard to heal
morCards.bodyWorkingDesc: Bleeding, soreness and fatigue is completely normal. Rest as much as you can.
morCards.bodyWorkingReassure: It's okay to have mixed feelings. Everything is allowed.
morCards.recoveryTakesTimeDesc: Pelvic floor exercises, rest and good nutrition. No rush.
morCards.recoveryTakesTimeReassure: Don't compare yourself to others. Your body, your pace.
morCards.findingRhythm: You're starting to find your rhythm
morCards.findingRhythmDesc: Your body is slowly finding its way back. Be patient with yourself.
morCards.findingRhythmReassure: You're doing better than you think. Seriously.
morCards.madeItMorning: You've made it through the morning
morCards.timeForBreak: Good time for a break. Even 15 minutes makes a difference.
morCards.deservedBreak: You don't need to ask for it. You've earned the break.

farCards.bodyHealingBirth: Her body is healing after birth

milestone.growing: {{childName}} is growing — and so are you. 💛

nearness.title: Everyday closeness
nearness.desc: Small actions that keep you close — even when life is chaotic.
nearness.newSuggestions: New suggestions every 6 hours — or tap to refresh 💛

starters: What do you need most from me right now?
What was the best part of your day with baby?
Is there something you'd like to do but haven't had time for?
What can we do differently tomorrow?
When did you last feel relaxed?
What are you most grateful for about us as a team?
Is there something stressing you that we can solve together?

settingsPage.themeDesc: Choose between light and dark theme. Dark mode is great at night.
settingsPage.languagePerRole: Choose your preferred language. Each parent can have their own language.

farFacts.allDone: Amazing! You're making a huge difference for the whole family 💚

morMicro: You're doing great — even when it doesn't feel like it 💛
It's okay to be tired. This is a tough phase.
You don't need to have it all together. Just be there.
Small steps count. You're an amazing mom.
Accepting help is strength, not weakness.

checkin.okayResponse: That's fine. One day at a time.
checkin.hardResponse: Thank you for checking in. You're doing better than you think.

momNudges.detail: You don't need a reason. Just do it.
Fresh air and silence work wonders.
Asking for help is strength, not weakness.
Small things that feel big right now.

momNudges.text: Write one thing you're grateful for

dadNudges.detail: {{partnerName}} gets a break — you get fresh air.
'I see everything you do' always works.
Bath, diaper, pajamas — you've got this, {{childName}} loves it.
Just 30 minutes without responsibility makes a huge difference.

dadNudges.text: See what needs doing — and do it
dadNudges.detail: No checklist needed. Just do it.
